ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "police_forces" (
  "force_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each police force */,
  "force_name" TEXT /* Name of the police force */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the force operates */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the police force */,
  "established_date" TEXT /* Date when the force was established */,
  "headquarters_location" TEXT /* Location of the force's headquarters */,
  "total_officers" INTEGER /* Total number of officers in the force */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("force_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_police_forces_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "expenditure" (
  "expenditure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each expenditure record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the expenditure */,
  "force_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the police force */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of expenditure in millions of pounds */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the expenditure */,
  "source_funding" TEXT /* Source of funding for the expenditure */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("expenditure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_expenditure_force_id FOREIGN KEY ("force_id") REFERENCES police_forces ("force_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "budgets" (
  "budget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each budget record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the budget */,
  "force_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the police force */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of budget in millions of pounds */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the budget */,
  "source_funding" TEXT /* Source of funding for the budget */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("budget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_budgets_force_id FOREIGN KEY ("force_id") REFERENCES police_forces ("force_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, financial analyst, auditor) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record being accessed (expenditure_id or budget_id) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser, device) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trails" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the action */,
  "record_id" INTEGER /* ID of the record being modified (expenditure_id or budget_id) */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed (e.g., insert, update, delete) */,
  "old_value" REAL /* Old value of the modified field */,
  "new_value" REAL /* New value of the modified field */,
  "actionDate" TEXT /* Date and time of the action */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the modification was made */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent (e.g., browser, device) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trails_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions_expenditure" (
  "region_expenditure_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region expenditure record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the expenditure */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "total_expenditure" REAL /* Total expenditure for the region in millions of pounds */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_expenditure_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regions_expenditure_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions_budget" (
  "region_budget_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region budget record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the budget */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "total_budget" REAL /* Total budget for the region in millions of pounds */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_budget_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regions_budget_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., expenditure, budget, comparison) */,
  "creation_date" TEXT /* Date the report was created */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_data" (
  "report_data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report data record */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the data */,
  "force_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the police force */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount of data (expenditure or budget) in millions of pounds */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the data */,
  "source_funding" TEXT /* Source of funding for the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_data_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_data_force_id FOREIGN KEY ("force_id") REFERENCES police_forces ("force_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role (e.g., view, edit, delete) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_role_assignments" (
  "assignment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role assignment */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date when the role was assigned */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("assignment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_role_assignments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
